case_title: HLAVENKA, JOY VS ALAC DEAN DBA ALAC DEAN CONSTRUCTION

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HLAVENKA, JOY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALAC DEAN DBA ALAC DEAN CONSTRUCTION $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,605.00, THE JUDGMENT INCLUDES DAMAGES FOR BAD FAITH FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CCP SECTION 1950.5, PERTAINING TO SECURITY DEPOSITS. COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $74.88 ACCRUED INTEREST, $45.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO PLAINTIFF HLAVENKA, JOY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY HLAVENKA, JOY AS TO DEFENDANT ALAC DEAN DBA ALAC DEAN CONSTRUCTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

2 ENDORSED PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS, CHECK #1327 IN THE AMOUNT OF $30, AND INSTRUCTION LETTER PLACED IN SHERIFF'S PICK-UP BOX.
